title: cyperus teneriffae f. petraeus
intro: Cyperus teneriffae f. petraeus, also known as dwarf umbrella sedge, is a perennial plant species within the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus teneriffae f. petraeus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
